data.text: MY FIRST LANDING AT 8,73 PRESENTED ME WITH TWO TINY ISLETS AMIDST
A GREENISH SEA. THE PLANET ITSELF IS MOSTLY LAND...MORE LANDINGS TO
AT 86,48 WE'VE GOT A GREENISH LANSCAPE WITH A SMALL CANYON.
AT 84,68 WE'VE FROZEN TERRAIN WITH A FAIR AMOUNT OF HOPPERS AND
56,32-MORE BROWNISH SOIL, SOMEWHAT SPARSE GREEN VEGETATION.
26,13-WE'VE GOT A SPECTACULAR, STEEP SIDED CANYON. THE SUNRISE VIEW
CONCLUDED EXPLORATION WITH A LANDING AT THE HIGH NORTH. NOTE THAT
POLAR TEMPERATURES HERE ARE RELATIVELY WARM...SOMETHING LIKE -30
